title: The Exact Spot Where Girolamo Savonarola Was Hanged and Burned

The Exact Spot Where Girolamo Savonarola Was Hanged and Burned

### Piazza della Signoria The piazza was already a central square in the original Roman town Florentia, surrounded by a theatre, Roman baths and  ...    full of holes. In 1385 it was paved for the first time. In 1497 Girolamo Savonarola and his followers carried out on this square the famous Bonfire of the Vanities, burning in a large pile books, gaming tables, fine dresses, and works of poets.
